query: SELECT id, slotDate, DAYNAME(slotDate) as dayName, currentParticipants FROM schedule_slots WHERE DAYNAME(slotDate) IN ('Tuesday', 'Thursday', 'Saturday') AND programId IN (SELECT id FROM programs WHERE type = 'clinic_105');
